title: Assistant Store Manager - MTR Foods - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - MTR Foods - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
MTR Foods is actively seeking a talented and motivated Assistant Store Manager to join our dynamic team in Kolkata. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About MTR Foods:
MTR Foods is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MTR Foods!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
